summary: The agent concludes that Bcl-2-like protein 1 (BCL2L4) is a pro-apoptotic protein because it is functionally equivalent to Bax, a well-documented inducer of mitochondrial outer membrane permeability and downstream apoptosis through cytochrome c release. This conclusion is based on up-to-date biochemical evidence confirming BAX’s essential role in the intrinsic apoptotic pathway.
